# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

admin:
  access_log_path: "/tmp/envoy-admin-access.log"
  address:
    socket_address: { address: "0.0.0.0", port_value: 8001 }

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: "0.0.0.0", port_value: 9901 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        config:
          codec_type: auto
          stat_prefix: ingress_cors
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: service-mesh-backend
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
                - match: { prefix: "/api" }
                  route: { cluster: "service-mesh-cluster" }
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.router
            config: {}
  clusters:
  - name: service-mesh-cluster
    connect_timeout: 0.25s
    type: strict_dns
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: service-mesh-cluster
      endpoints:
        - lb_endpoints:
          - endpoint:
              address:
                socket_address: { address: "192.0.2.1", port_value: 80 }
    transport_socket:
      name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
      config:
        common_tls_context:
          tls_certificate_sds_secret_names: ["service-mesh-backend"]
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
        max_connections: 4096
        max_pending_requests: 2048
        max_requests: 16384
    http2_protocol_options: {}
